oauthConsent.title: Allow {clientName} to access BSVibe?

oauthConsent.errorTitle: We couldn’t open this consent screen

oauthConsent.errorSubmitFailed: We couldn’t record your decision. Please try again.

form.name: Name
form.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens. Used in the URL.
form.slugError: Use lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens, starting with a letter.
form.repoUrlHint: Leave blank for a fresh workspace; the repo gets cloned and analyzed in the background if provided.
form.createError: Couldn’t create that product. That name may already be taken.

direct.label: Direct
direct.hint: Tell BSVibe what to do. Ask a question or start work.
direct.placeholder: e.g. “draft the launch post for bsvibe-site”
direct.errorSend: Couldn’t send that. Please try again.

skills.heading: Skills
skills.lede: The skills I can draw on while I work for you.
skills.editValidation: Please fill in a summary and system prompt.
skills.editError: Couldn’t save that skill just now. Try again in a moment.
skills.createSummaryPlaceholder: What this skill is for. I use this to know when to reach for it.
skills.createSystemPromptPlaceholder: The instructions I follow when I use this skill.
skills.createValidation: Please fill in a name, summary, and system prompt.
skills.createConflict: A skill with that name already exists. Try a different name.
skills.createError: Couldn’t create that skill just now. Try again in a moment.
skills.emptySub: Skills you add to this workspace will show up here for me to use.
skills.notFoundSubPrefix: It may have been renamed or removed.
skills.viewerErrorLine: Couldn’t load this skill just now.
skills.systemPromptNo: This skill has no system prompt.

knowledge.heading: Knowledge
knowledge.lede: A look at what I’ve learned working with you.
knowledge.graphError: Couldn’t draw the knowledge graph just now. Try again in a moment.
knowledge.graphEmptySub: Knowledge links will appear here as I learn, concepts and how they relate.
knowledge.inspectorError: Couldn’t load this concept just now. Try again in a moment.
knowledge.inspectorEditedBadgeTitle: You corrected this in this session.
knowledge.retractModalLede: Future runs about this topic will no longer see it.
knowledge.retractModalReasonPlaceholder: e.g. we changed the rate limit policy
knowledge.retractModalError: Couldn't retract that just now. Try again in a moment.
knowledge.correctModalLede: Replace the body of this note. Future runs will see the new text.
knowledge.correctModalError: Couldn't save that just now. Try again in a moment.
knowledge.undoToastRetractedMessage: Retracted "{name}". Future runs won't see this.
knowledge.undoToastCorrectedMessage: Corrected "{name}". Future runs will see the new content.
knowledge.undoToastError: Couldn't undo just now. Try again in a moment.

decisions.heading: Decisions
decisions.lede: Questions BSVibe needs your judgment on. Your answers become precedent. The same question won’t be asked twice.
decisions.emptySub: Held deliveries, paused-run questions, and knowledge reviews will show up here when they need a call.
decisions.footnote: Every resolved decision is added to your knowledge. BSVibe uses it as precedent next time.
decisions.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. “Not a duplicate. Keep them separate.”
decisions.deliveryQuestion: A delivery is held in Safe Mode. Send it out?
decisions.deliveryGroupQuestion: {count} deliveries from one run are held in Safe Mode. Send them all out?
decisions.proposalRationale: Merging keeps your knowledge graph from holding the same idea twice.
decisions.resolveError: Couldn’t do that. Please try again.

brief.heading: Brief
brief.allCaughtUp: All caught up. Nothing running right now.

models.lede: Models: how BSVibe gets its thinking done.
models.accountsLede: The LLM account I run on. I use the active one to do work. Register it here once and it stays encrypted.
models.noneActiveWarn: None of these are active. Activate one so I can run work.
models.loadError: Couldn’t load your model accounts right now. Try again in a moment.
models.empty: Add the model that powers your AI. Without it I can’t run work.
models.rowError: Couldn’t do that. Please try again.
models.label: Label
models.labelPlaceholder: A name you'll recognise, e.g. Primary
models.apiBasePlaceholder: Override only for self-hosted / proxy endpoints
models.apiKeyPlaceholder: The provider credential. Stored encrypted, never shown again
models.apiKeyHint: I store this encrypted and never show it back. You won’t see it again here.
models.addError: Couldn’t add that model account. Check the details and try again.
models.addSuccess: Added “{label}”. The key is stored encrypted. It won’t be shown again.

workers.lede: Machines you run the BSVibe worker on, where your coding-agent CLIs (Claude Code, Codex, opencode) are signed in. Connect one and I can route work to those CLIs under your own subscription.
workers.loadError: Couldn't load your workers right now. Try again in a moment.
workers.empty: No worker connected yet. Add one to let me run work on your own coding-agent CLIs.
workers.installTitle: Set up the worker on the host you want to run it from
workers.installHint: Run this on the machine where your coding-agent CLIs (Claude Code, Codex, opencode) are signed in. `bsvibe login` opens your browser once to authenticate the host; `bsvibe-worker register` then registers it and saves a per-worker token at `~/.bsvibe/worker.token`. No install token to paste.
workers.installCommand: BSVIBE_WORKER_SERVER_URL={serverUrl} bsvibe login && bsvibe-worker register --name $(hostname) && bsvibe-worker run
workers.installNotes: After it finishes, the host shows up in the list below within a few seconds.
workers.staleTitle: The worker says online, but its last heartbeat is older than the 120s freshness cutoff — the daemon may have died without clearing the status.
workers.statusTitle: Online means the worker sent a recent heartbeat
workers.revokeError: Couldn't revoke that. Please try again.

default.lede: When no routing rule matches a caller, the dispatch resolver routes here. Leave it as “None” to surface a missing-route error to me instead of silently picking a model.
default.loadError: Couldn’t load your default model right now. Try again in a moment.
default.noActiveAccounts: No active model accounts yet. Add one above first.

routing.lede: How I pick a model for each unit of work. Rules run by priority (lowest first); the first match wins. The default catches everything else.
routing.loadError: Couldn’t load your routing rules right now. Try again in a moment.
routing.empty: No routing rules yet. All work goes to the active model account. Add a rule to send some work elsewhere.
routing.priorityTitle: Lower priority runs first. The first matching rule wins
routing.removeError: Couldn’t remove that. Please try again.
routing.makeDefault: Make this the default (catches everything else)
routing.addError: Couldn’t add that rule. Check the details and try again.

connectors.lede: The external systems I can read from and act on. Connect a service to give it a private webhook to reach me, and an optional place for me to deliver finished work back out.
connectors.loadError: Couldn’t load your connectors right now. Try again in a moment.
connectors.empty: Nothing connected yet. Pick a service below to wire one up.
connectors.comingSoon: Coming soon. There’s no backend for this yet.
connectors.customDetail: Point me at your own MCP server endpoint or a plugin built with the plugin SDK.

row.revokeError: Couldn’t revoke that. Please try again.
row.configureTitle: Configuring a connected service isn’t available yet. Coming soon.
row.importError: Import failed. Check the connector config and try again.

form.createdTitle: Connector added. Here’s its webhook. Copy it now.
form.createdWarn: This is the only time you’ll see this. The token is a secret. You won’t see it again, so copy it before you close this.
form.createdHint: Paste the webhook URL into {service}’s outgoing-webhook settings. The token is part of the URL. Keep it private.
form.deliveryConfigHint: Where I deliver finished work back out. Leave blank for inbound-only.
form.jsonError: Delivery config is not valid JSON. Fix it or leave it blank.
form.createError: Couldn’t register that connector. Check the details and try again.

notifications.lede: Notifications: when and where BSVibe pings you.
notifications.loadError: Couldn’t load your notification settings right now. Try again in a moment.
notifications.saveError: Couldn’t save that change. It’s been undone. Try again in a moment.
notifications.matrixCaption: Channels follow your Connectors. In-app always works.

needs_you.label: Needs you: a decision is waiting

triggered.label: Triggered: work woke up from outside

notifications.quietHoursCaption: During quiet hours, only “Needs you” reaches you in-app. Everything else waits for morning.

account.name: Name
account.nameHint: Editing your name is coming soon.

general.workspaceNameSaveError: Couldn’t save that change. Try again in a moment.
general.safeModeSafeCaption: Safe: every delivery waits for your approval before it ships.
general.safeModeAutoCaption: Auto: deliveries ship without asking. Real blockers still come to you.

developer.lede: Manage OAuth clients that connect to your bsvibe-app — Claude Code's MCP driver, IDE plugins, custom integrations.

clients.title: OAuth clients
clients.empty: No OAuth clients registered. Add one to connect Claude Code or another MCP client.
clients.redirectHint: Use http://127.0.0.1/callback for native CLI clients (any port works at runtime per RFC 8252).
clients.createdHint: Copy the client_id below into your external app's config. The OAuth flow handles the rest.

mcp.title: MCP server endpoint
mcp.lede: bsvibe-app fronts an MCP server at the URL below. Claude Code (and any RFC 9728-compliant MCP client) discovers the OAuth flow automatically — you only need the URL.
mcp.configHint: Add this entry to `~/.config/claude-code/mcp.json` (or run `claude mcp add bsvibe <url>`). The CLI handles the OAuth dance via the WWW-Authenticate header — no token in this file.
mcp.scopeRead: mcp:read — list products, runs, deliverables, Safe Mode queue; search and read vault notes.
mcp.scopeWrite: mcp:write — create products, post Direct messages, approve/deny Safe Mode items, write vault seeds.
mcp.scopeAdmin: mcp:admin — reserved for future admin tools (settings mutations, dangerous deletes).

report.errorLine: Couldn’t load this report just now.
report.referencedHint: Past decisions, preferences, and rejections that informed this work.
report.noVerification: No verification recorded for this deliverable yet.
report.noChecksDeclared: No checks were declared for this verification.
report.noChecksAfterKnowledge: No additional checks beyond the referenced knowledge above.
report.noArtifacts: Nothing was produced for this deliverable.
report.artifactTruncated: Showing the first part of this file. It was larger than we display inline.
report.artifactUnavailable: Couldn’t show this file right now.
report.artifactUnavailableWithDiff: Couldn’t show this file. See the diff for the full change.
report.rollbackConfirmLede: This reverses the external action this deliverable produced. It can’t be undone.
report.rollbackNothing: Nothing to roll back — this produced no external artifact.
report.rollbackFailed: Couldn’t roll back just now. Try again in a moment.
report.writtenHint: Notes this work added to your knowledge base.

run.errorLine: Couldn’t load this run just now.
run.safeModeExternal: Came from outside BSVibe. I won’t push, merge, or reply until you approve.
run.decisionRationale: Because this came from outside, BSVibe is in Safe Mode.
run.resolveError: Couldn’t do that. Please try again.
run.noVerification: No verification recorded for this run yet.
run.timelineDerived: Reconstructed from what was recorded. Not a step-by-step log.
run.nextDecision: This needs your decision before I go on.
run.nextFailed: This didn't finish. You can try again.

failureHuman.executorCrash: The coding agent stopped unexpectedly while working on this.
failureHuman.loopCrashed: Something went wrong while running this.
failureHuman.systemError: An internal error interrupted this run.
failureHuman.timeout: It took too long and timed out.

run.stopError: Couldn't stop it — please try again.
